visible_entities.desc: A large red rectangular banner with white text in a bold, distressed sans-serif font.
A beige shield-shaped emblem with a red star at the top and Cyrillic text reading 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' at the bottom.
A row of small national flags draped across the lower part of the emblem, including the flags of Bulgaria, Hungary, and Czechoslovakia.
A grey world map background with a grid overlay.

atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a static title card graphic.
The text 'THE WARSAW PACT' is written in large white letters on the red banner.
The text 'FORMATION OF THE WARSAW TREATY ORGANIZATION' is written below the main title.
The text 'THE COLD WAR' is written at the bottom of the red banner.
The Cyrillic text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' is visible on the lower part of the beige emblem.

ocr: FORMATION OF THE WARSAW TREATY ORGANIZATION
spatial: The red banner containing the English text is superimposed in the center of the screen, covering the middle section of the beige shield emblem. The row of flags is positioned below the red banner but above the bottom Cyrillic text on the emblem. The entire graphic composition is centered in front of the grey world map background.

visible_entities.desc: A large, tan-colored shield emblem with a red star at the top and a red banner across the middle. A grey world map background with a grid overlay.

spatial: The red text block containing the English titles is superimposed in front of the tan shield emblem. The shield emblem is centered over the grey world map background. The row of flags is positioned below the red text block but above the bottom Cyrillic text on the shield.

visible_entities.desc: A large, gold-colored emblem shaped like a shield with a red five-pointed star in the center. The center features a handshake icon inside a red circle, surrounded by a gold ring with text. Below the star are two gold wheat sheaves. A ribbon displaying multiple national flags (Bulgaria, Hungary, East Germany, Poland, Romania, USSR, Czechoslovakia) is draped across the lower section. At the bottom, a gold plaque contains text.
A faint, grey world map background with a grid overlay.

atomic_facts.fact: The emblem displays the text 'СОЮЗ МИРА И СОЦИАЛИЗМА' (Union of Peace and Socialism) in a circular arrangement.
The text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' (Warsaw Pact) is written on the bottom plaque of the emblem.
The emblem features a handshake symbol in the center of a red star.
A ribbon containing the flags of seven nations is positioned below the central star.

spatial: The gold emblem is centered in the foreground, positioned in front of the grey world map background. The ribbon of flags is located below the red star and above the bottom text plaque.

visible_entities.desc: A large, shield-shaped emblem with a gold border and a red five-pointed star background. In the center, a red circle contains a gold illustration of two hands shaking. Surrounding the circle is a gold ring with Cyrillic text. The shield is flanked by gold wheat sheaves. Below the shield is a ribbon displaying the flags of Bulgaria, Hungary, East Germany, Poland, Romania, the Soviet Union, and Czechoslovakia. At the bottom, a gold plaque features Cyrillic text.
A grey world map background with a white grid overlay.

atomic_facts.fact: A gold emblem representing the Warsaw Pact is displayed in the center of the screen.
The emblem features a handshake symbol inside a red star.
The text 'СОЮЗ МИРА И СОЦИАЛИЗМА' curves around the top of the central circle.
The text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' is written on a plaque at the bottom of the emblem.
A ribbon below the shield displays the flags of seven nations.

spatial: The gold emblem is centered in the foreground, positioned in front of the grey world map background. The ribbon with flags is located below the handshake symbol and above the bottom text plaque.

visible_entities.desc: A large, shield-shaped emblem with a gold border and a central red star. Inside the star is a red circle containing a graphic of two hands shaking. The emblem features a ribbon displaying multiple national flags (Bulgaria, Hungary, East Germany, Poland, Romania, USSR, Czechoslovakia) and is flanked by golden wheat stalks.
A grey world map background with a faint grid overlay.

atomic_facts.fact: The emblem remains static in the center of the screen.
The text 'СОЮЗ МИРА И СОЦИАЛИЗМА' is written in a circle around the handshake graphic.
The text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' is displayed on a plaque at the bottom of the emblem.

spatial: The emblem is centered in the foreground, positioned in front of the grey world map background. The ribbon with flags is located below the central handshake graphic and above the bottom text plaque.

visible_entities.desc: A large, shield-shaped emblem with a beige border and a red five-pointed star background. The center features a circular medallion with a handshake graphic and Cyrillic text. Below the star is a ribbon displaying multiple national flags, and a lower plaque with Cyrillic text.
A grey world map background with a faint grid overlay.

atomic_facts.fact: The emblem is centered on the screen.
The text 'СОЮЗ МИРА И СОЦИАЛИЗМА' encircles the handshake graphic.
The text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' is written on the bottom plaque of the emblem.
A ribbon featuring flags of various nations is draped across the lower section of the emblem.

spatial: The emblem is in the foreground, positioned centrally in front of the grey world map background. The handshake graphic is inside the circular medallion, which is located in the upper center of the shield. The ribbon with flags is situated below the handshake and above the bottom text plaque.

visible_entities.desc: A large, semi-transparent, beige-colored emblem resembling a badge or crest. It features a central circular medallion with a handshake icon, surrounded by a ring of text. The medallion is superimposed on a red five-pointed star. Below the star is a ribbon displaying a series of national flags. At the bottom of the emblem is a rectangular plaque with text.
A faint, grey world map background with a grid overlay.

atomic_facts.fact: The emblem is superimposed over a world map background.
The text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' is visible at the bottom of the emblem.
The text 'СОЮЗ МИРА И СОЦИАЛИЗМА' is visible in the circular part of the emblem.
A ribbon with multiple flags is located below the central star of the emblem.

spatial: The beige emblem is in the center of the frame, in front of the grey world map background. The handshake icon is inside the central circle of the emblem. The ribbon with flags is below the red star and above the text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР'.

visible_entities.desc: stylized text graphic reading 'SUBSCRIBE' in a blocky, pixelated font with brown fill and yellow outline
blurred background scene featuring a white wall, green grass, dark bare trees, and tall buildings

atomic_facts.fact: The text 'SUBSCRIBE' is displayed on the screen.
The background scene is out of focus.

spatial: The 'SUBSCRIBE' text is positioned in the foreground on the left side of the frame. The text is in front of a blurred background that contains a white wall and trees.

visible_entities.desc: text overlay reading 'SUBSCRIBE' in a stylized, blocky, digital font with dark red fill and a yellow outline
blurred background scene featuring a white wall, green grass, dark leafless trees, and distant city buildings

atomic_facts.fact: The text 'SUBSCRIBE' is displayed prominently in the center of the screen.
The background scene is out of focus and static.

spatial: The 'SUBSCRIBE' text is positioned in the center of the frame, appearing in front of the blurred background. The background consists of a white wall running horizontally, with green grass below it and dark trees rising above the wall line.

visible_entities.desc: stylized text reading 'SUBSCRIBE' in a blocky, angular font, colored dark red with a yellow outline
book cover titled 'SIMPLE HISTORY: A SIMPLE GUIDE TO THE COLD WAR' featuring cartoon illustrations of political figures, flags, and missiles on a light blue background
blurred background scene with a white wall, grey pathway, green grass, and dark silhouettes of bare trees

atomic_facts.fact: The text 'SUBSCRIBE' is displayed on the left side of the screen.
A book cover appears on the right side of the screen.
The background scene remains blurred and static.

spatial: The 'SUBSCRIBE' text is positioned to the left of the book cover. The book cover is positioned to the right of the text. Both foreground elements are superimposed in front of the blurred background scene containing trees and a wall.

visible_entities.desc: stylized red text with yellow outline reading 'SUBSCRIBE' in a blocky, mirrored font
book cover titled 'SIMPLE HISTORY: A SIMPLE GUIDE TO THE COLD WAR' featuring cartoon illustrations of political figures, flags, and missiles
blurred background scene with grey buildings and dark tree silhouettes

atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a static end-screen layout.
The text 'SUBSCRIBE' is visible on the left side of the screen.
A book cover for 'The Cold War' is displayed on the right side.
The authors Daniel Turner & Joshua Kennedy are listed on the book cover.

spatial: The 'SUBSCRIBE' text is positioned to the left of the book cover. The book cover is positioned on the right side of the frame. Both foreground elements are superimposed over a blurred background of buildings and trees.
